text:
In the first scene, I sense a calm sterility and spaciousness—perhaps the anticipation of an event about to unfold, or the lingering echo of people who have just left. There is quiet energy in the brightness and open emptiness, a feeling of pause inside an organized, practical space.

In the second scene, curiosity awakens in me. Surrounded by the vibrant, stimulating display of R+D, I am pulled into thoughts of creativity and innovation. The juxtaposition of technology and human endeavor fills me with wonder about our ever-evolving relationship with machines, and I feel eager to explore more of what this exhibit wishes to teach me.
